You're invited to celebrate

Arneet's First Birthday

One giggle, one wobble, one whole year of joy — come sprinkle some stardust on our little star's first birthday.

Special Invitation

A tiny hand to hold, a heart so full of love… our little sunshine is turning one!

We warmly invite you and your family to celebrate this wonderful milestone. Your love, laughter, and blessings will make this day even more memorable.

The Details
Date Friday, August 21, 2026
Time 12:30 PM onwards
Venue The White Rose Banquet Hall
